name: hb_1_14
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Hebei Zongheng Group Fengnan Steel Co., Ltd. over 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12 compute and store: peak_flue_gas, mean_flue_gas, std_flue_gas (float), peak_flue_gas_offset_hours (whole hours from 2025-06-10 00:00 to the spike, int).

turns.query: Identify abnormal emission spikes of Hebei Zongheng Group Fengnan Steel Co., Ltd. during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12 and determine potential causes.
